seo.title: Building Research Agents with Haystack + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build research agents with Haystack + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Haystack enables building sophisticated Research Agents that perform multi-step web search, document retrieval, and synthesis for accurate information summarization. Guardrails are essential to mitigate risks like irrelevant retrievals, hallucinations, and unverified claims that can undermine trust in agent outputs. Vex integration provides runtime verification for source accuracy, recency, and bias detection in these pipelines.

architectureOverview.heading: Research Agents Architecture with Haystack
architectureOverview.description:
Research Agents in Haystack typically follow a multi-stage pipeline: starting with a web search or retriever to gather relevant documents, followed by a reranker to improve relevance, then a generator that synthesizes insights from retrieved context. Custom components handle analysis steps like claim extraction and source verification. The pipeline processes user queries through these composable nodes, producing structured summaries with citations.

Key components include DocumentStore for persistence, Retriever (e.g., BM25 or hybrid), Reranker (e.g., Cohere), and LLM-based Reader/Generator. Agents may loop through refinement steps, verifying recency and bias before final output. This modular design allows precise Vex integration at verification points.

Failure modes often occur at type boundaries between components or when generators stray from context, making runtime checks critical.
architectureOverview.diagram:
User Query
    |
    v
[Retriever] --> [Reranker] --> [Vex Verifier]
    |                       |
    v                       v
[DocumentStore]      [Generator]
    |                       |
    +---------- [Synthesis] <+
                   |
                   v
              Final Summary

risks.name: Pipeline component output type mismatches
risks.description: Retriever outputs non-standard Document objects expected by downstream reranker
risks.mitigation: Vex schema validation between pipeline nodes

risks.name: Retriever returning irrelevant documents
risks.description: BM25 or embedding retriever fetches outdated or off-topic sources
risks.mitigation: Vex relevance scoring and source verification

risks.name: Generator hallucinating beyond retrieved context
risks.description: LLM fabricates claims not grounded in provided documents
risks.mitigation: Vex context faithfulness and citation tracing

risks.name: Custom component errors silently swallowed
risks.description: Agent refinement loops fail without surfacing issues to user

implementation.title: Basic Research Pipeline Setup
implementation.description: Core pipeline with retriever, reranker, and generator for research synthesis
implementation.code:
from haystack import Pipeline
from haystack.components.retrievers.in_memory import InMemoryEmbeddingRetriever
from haystack.components.generators import OpenAIGenerator
from haystack.components.builders import PromptBuilder

retrieval = Pipeline()
retrieval.add_component("retriever", InMemoryEmbeddingRetriever())
retrieval.add_component("prompt_builder", PromptBuilder(template="Answer using context: {{documents}}\nQuery: {{query}}"))
retrieval.add_component("generator", OpenAIGenerator(api_key="your-key"))
retrieval.connect("retriever.documents", "prompt_builder.documents")
retrieval.connect("prompt_builder", "generator")

vexIntegration.title: Vex Source Verifier Component
vexIntegration.description: Custom Haystack component using Vex for source recency and bias checks

vexIntegration.title: Vex Context Faithfulness Guard
vexIntegration.description: Verify generator output stays faithful to retrieved context
vexIntegration.code:
from haystack import Pipeline

pipe = Pipeline()
pipe.add_component("vex_verifier", VexSourceVerifier(vex_api_key="vex-key"))
pipe.add_component("generator", OpenAIGenerator())

pipe.connect("retriever.documents", "vex_verifier.documents")
pipe.connect("vex_verifier.verified_docs", "prompt_builder.documents")
pipe.connect("prompt_builder", "generator")

# Only use verified documents
result = pipe.run({
    "retriever": {"query": "research query"}
})

vexIntegration.title: Claim Accuracy Pipeline Integration
vexIntegration.description: Full pipeline with Vex verifying extracted claims against sources
vexIntegration.code:
full_research_pipe = Pipeline()
full_research_pipe.add_component("retriever", InMemoryEmbeddingRetriever())
full_research_pipe.add_component("vex_sources", VexSourceVerifier("vex-key"))
full_research_pipe.add_component("extractor", ClaimExtractor())
full_research_pipe.add_component("vex_claims", VexClaimVerifier("vex-key"))

full_research_pipe.connect("retriever.documents", "vex_sources.documents")
full_research_pipe.connect("vex_sources.verified_docs", "extractor.documents")
full_research_pipe.connect("extractor.claims", "vex_claims.claims")

verified_result = full_research_pipe.run({"retriever": {"query": "AI advancements 2024"}})
